arguments.argument:
//---------- Fade Back ---------- draw_set_color(c_black) draw_set_alpha(0.33) draw_rectangle(view_xview[0]-1,view_yview[0]-1,view_xview[0]+view_wview[0]+1,view_yview[0]+view_hview[0]+1,false)
draw_set_color(c_white) draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_font(fnt_Swap) draw_set_halign(fa_center) draw_text(view_xview[0]+240,view_yview[0]+168,"PAUSED")
